Chelsea strike Maurizio Sarri deal with Italian manager in 'total agreement' with the Blues to replace Antonio Conte

Chelsea have a 'total agreement' with Maurizio Sarri to be their new manager.

The Blues have been negotiating since the end of the season with Antonio Conte almost certain to be sacked.

Napoli have already moved to replace Sarri with Carlo Ancelotti, but Aurelio De Laurentiis will not release his former manager until a compensation package has been agreed with the Blues.

Now though, Calcio Napoli 24 claim a compromise has been found and that Sarri will pen a two-year contract at Stamford Bridge until 2020, with the option of a further 12 months.

The compensation will be €5m for Napoli, with all parties now satisfied. The price of firing Conte though remains unclear with one year remaining on his contract.

轉會情況:

簡單講解番車路士轉會運作情況先:

1. 球探及足球總監定期向教練推薦球員
2. 教練參考球探意見，再加上自己既心水球員，交轉會target list比高層
3. Marina按球員年齡/人工/轉會費等原則剔除target
4. 進行談判

由於車路士教練既職位未confirm，所以唔會有任何轉會操作。

高層會繼續同唔同既經理人見面，了解下各球員既availability，但唔會落bid。(U18球員例外)

以Lemar為例，根據法媒報導，車路士要求Lemar等到新教練上任後先展開談判，Lemar唔想拖咁耐所以選擇左馬體會。

根據意媒消息指，Albiol, Hysaj, Zielinski 會係Sarri想帶過黎車路士既球員，但Napoli有可能禁止車路士簽入任何Napoli球員，作為低價放走Sarri既條件之一。

至於球會target方面，Lemar, Telles, Lascelles, Seri等等係球會今季視察得最多以及名氣較大既幾位球員。

結果都係賤女人大撚晒

Senior Chelsea stars growing restless over lack of transfer signings

Senior Chelsea players are growing increasingly concerned that the club have yet to make any summer signings.

Chelsea are beset with uncertainty. The club are yet to act on the future of coach Antonio Conte, despite holding talks with possible replacements, while they have been without a technical director since Michael Emenalo left last November.

Some of their rivals have already started strengthening ahead of the next Premier League campaign, despite the inconvenience of the World Cup.

Liverpool have spent £97.7million on Naby Keita and Fabinho, while Manchester United have purchased Diogo Dalot from Porto and a £52m deal for Shakhtar Donetsk midfielder Fred will go through once personal terms have been finalised. Arsenal have added Stephen Liechsteiner to their ranks, while a deal for Borussia Dortmund defender Sokratis Papastathopoulos has been agreed.

Champions Manchester City and Tottenham have yet to recruit, although the former are expected to beat the Blues to the signature of Napoli star Jorginho.

Last summer followed a similar pattern and Chelsea, who were reigning champions, finished the season a disappointing fifth. Their first acquisition was the free transfer of Willy Caballero on July 1, plus a move for teenager Ethan Ampadu. Just four more players arrived, despite Diego Costa, Nemanja Matic, John Terry, Nathan Ake, Nathaniel Chalobah and Bertrand Traore all leaving.

Despite buying internationals Alvaro Morata, Antonio Rudiger, Danny Drinkwater and Tiemoue Bakayoko, it was not considered enough by some within the squad to help them cope with the rigours of playing in four competitions.

One insider has revealed that a repeat of 12 months ago will not only damage Chelsea’s hopes of competing for the title, but also in the club’s bid to keep Eden Hazard and Thibaut Courtois. The Belgians, who have two years and one year left on their contract respectively, have urged Chelsea to show ambition during the close season.

Hazard added to the uncertainty yesterday by saying: “Real Madrid may interest me, everybody knows this. They already know what they have to do if they want me.”

Napoli’s Maurizio Sarri is in line to take over from Conte, while Juliano Belletti and Michael Ballack have been considered for the technical role.

部份年青球員/外借大軍成員情況:

Batshuayi: 由於多蒙特有新教練上任，Batshuayi唔再係多蒙特既top target。

Dujon Sterling: 會外借英甲Coventry 一年，主要原因同Coventry助教Adi Viveash係前車路士U21主教練有關。

Van Ginkel: PSV比唔起10m轉會費，睇下PSV係稍後時間會唔會出售球員籌錢，另外有幾間土超球會已經展現左興趣。

Kenedy: Benitez keep住有同Kenedy經理人接觸，紐卡素有興趣買斷或者續借一年，但如無意外車路士唔會咁快下定論，Kenedy至少會參與球會pre season，再由新教練決定去留。

Miazga: 無興趣再留係Vitesse，希望外借去更高級數既聯賽。

St Clair: 正式同意乙球會Venezia簽約3年。

Beeney: 正式同愛超球會Sligo Rovers簽約1年’

Pantic: 由於Partizan比唔起轉會費，所以傾緊續借一年，暫時車路士已經批准Pantic去Partizan跟操。

Omeruo: 連續係土超渡過左3年，所以引來唔少土超球會既興趣，Trabzonspor同Göztepe希望租借Omeruo一個球季。

Musonda: 暫時法甲Lile已經表示左興趣，但預計Musonda會先參與車路士pre season。

Ruben Loftus-Cheek is ready for his first World Cup start — but admits he may have to quit Chelsea this summer, writes John Cross in Repino.

Loftus-Cheek is considering his future at Stamford Bridge after a season-long loan at Crystal Palace helped push him into the England squad for Russia 2018.

The 22-year-old midfielder is set to come in for Dele Alli who has a thigh injury and is likely to miss the Panama clash on Sunday.

Loftus-Cheek is desperate not to go back to Chelsea just to sit on the subs' bench and that has alerted both Palace and West Ham, who are both keen.

1992年情人節當天，艾歷臣在丹麥的Middelfart出生。由於父母都踢足球，他3歲開始在便接觸足球，從此愛不惜手。今天他以熱刺球員身分出戰世界盃，但車路士才是他首支有機會加盟的倫敦球會，當他還是14、15歲時，曾赴車路士、巴塞隆拿及AC米蘭試腳，最終車路士未有出手，只因他們選擇了「視野、控球等技術同等的球員」，那就是麥伊治蘭（Josh McEachran）。艾歷臣回想當時，承認自己未準備好︰「那裏的足球比想像中更講究力量，就像是另一個世界。」
